use_cases: Adding decorative sparkle trails to follow cursor movements on creative portfolio sites
Creating interactive gaming overlays with visual flair following player actions
Enhancing product showcases with trailing effects to draw attention
Adding playful cursor feedback to entertainment and streaming platforms
Building interactive landing pages with mesmerizing mouse trail animations
ai_summary: A mouse trail component that renders a sequence of flair/sparkle images following the cursor position. The ImageTrailController manages element lifecycle and position updates, creating a smooth trailing effect. Best suited for desktop experiences where cursor movement drives visual engagement on creative, media, and e-commerce platforms.
